narrative.headline: 2019 Nissan Murano: driver-assist glitches lead the complaints
narrative.summary: From 41 owner complaints filed with NHTSA, the biggest cluster is the forward collision avoidance system at 24% of reports, followed by speed control at 15%. Air bag complaints are fewer (12%) but more serious: 1 crash and 2 injuries are tied to them. No fires were reported in any category.

issues.title: Forward Collision Avoidance
issues.blurb: The top complaint by far: 10 reports (24%). Owners describe the collision-warning system acting up. No crashes or injuries were reported here. On a test drive, watch for warning lights flickering on and off.

issues.title: Vehicle Speed Control
issues.blurb: Second most common: 6 reports (15%) about how the car responds to the accelerator and brake. No crashes or injuries reported. Pay attention to how the throttle responds during a test drive.

issues.title: Air Bags
issues.blurb: Fewer reports (5, or 12%) but the most serious group: 1 crash and 2 injuries are linked to air bag complaints. Make sure the air bag warning light is off and stays off.

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: 4 reports (10%) about the brakes. No crashes or injuries reported. Check that braking feels firm and the brake warning light is not lit.

issues.title: Structure
issues.blurb: The smallest group: 2 reports (5%) about the vehicle body. No crashes or injuries reported.
